data.title: Mantra’s 13 April Dump Was Predicted on 27 March 2025
data.description:
Mantra (OM) experienced a 90% drop due to issues in its tokenomics, where 52% of tokens were held by 10 accounts, prompting speculation of manipulation.
source: https://blockchainlab.co.in/mantras-13-april-crash-wiped-90-percent-price/

data.title: Binance Alpha Lists Fair and Free (FAIR3)
data.description: Binance Alpha has officially listed Fair and Free (FAIR3), expanding its early-access token offerings with the launch of this community-driven project.

data.title: CZ responds to KOL comments: It's ridiculous, they are keen on making up stories to earn traffic
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CZ responded to the KOL's previous statement "CZ works for the Federal Reserve, cooperates in harvesting the world, and has never been imprisoned" on the X platform, saying: "This is ridiculous. This Chinese KOL said that I work for the Federal Reserve and I have never been to prison. How I wish this was true. Now Chinese KOLs have a saying: make up a story about Binance or CZ, and you can bring a lot of traffic. Today, this guy got 119,000 listeners on X Spaces with this rumor."

data.title: Stock Market Growth and Unemployment Rate Forecasts Reach New Lows
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, a report from the New York Federal Reserve indicates that the anticipated stock market growth for March is expected to be the lowest since June 2022, while the unemployment rate is projected to rise to its highest level since April 2020.

The report forecasts an inflation rate of 3.6% for March next year, compared to 3.1% in February. The expected inflation rate for the next three years remains steady at 3%. Additionally, the five-year inflation expectation for March is 2.9%, slightly down from 3% in February.

data.title: U.S. Crypto Custody Bank Anchorage Under Investigation by Homeland Security
data.description: According to PANews, Anchorage, a U.S.-based crypto custody bank, is currently under investigation by the Department of Homeland Security. Details regarding the investigation have not been disclosed.

data.title: Google plans to restrict cryptocurrency advertising in the EU, or only allow companies with MiCA licenses to place
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Google announced that advertisers must hold the EU MiCA license and pass its certification to place crypto ads on its platform. It is reported that many exchanges such as OKX, Bitpanda and MoonPay have met the MiCA standards.

data.title: Binance Alpha上线Fair and Free (FAIR3)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the Binance APP page, Binance Alpha has launched Fair and Free (FAIR3).

data.title: U.S. Inflation Expectations Rise in March
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the New York Federal Reserve reported that the one-year inflation expectation in the United States for March reached 3.58%. This figure surpasses the previous forecast of 3.26% and the prior value of 3.13%.

data.title: US Department of Homeland Security Investigates Crypto Bank Anchorage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news: The U.S. Department of Homeland Security is investigating the crypto bank Anchorage.

data.title: Trump-backed WLFI stablecoin USD1 enters DeFi space with strong early activity
data.description:
World Liberty Financial (WLFI), the DeFi project backed by President Trump’s family, appears to have launched its highly anticipated stablecoin USD1. Reports from blockchain aggregators and on-chain data show that the stablecoin is already trading with over $100 million in market cap. According to data from CoinMarketCap and Coingecko, USD1 has already started trading. CoinMarketCap […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/wlfi-stablecoin-usd1-enters-defi-space/
